app.name: Alhemmah
app.description: Alhemmah is a free, bilingual daily schedule and routine tracker. Plan your day in time blocks, run a timer on each task, check off your progress, and keep an editable per-day history, in English and العربية.
app.tagline: Plan your day, time your tasks, and build a routine that sticks.

landing.metaTitle: Alhemmah: Free Daily Schedule & Routine Tracker (English & Arabic)
landing.metaDescription: Build a daily routine that sticks. Alhemmah lets you plan your day in time blocks, run a timer on every task, check off progress, and review your history. Free, no ads, and fully bilingual (English / العربية).
landing.heroTitle: Build a daily routine that actually sticks
landing.heroSubtitle: Alhemmah turns your ideal day into an ordered set of time blocks, start a timer on each task, check off what you finish, and watch your routine come together. In English and العربية.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need to run your day
landing.f1Body: Hand-write your standard day as ordered work blocks and breaks. Alhemmah replays it every morning so you never rebuild it.
landing.f2Body: Start, pause, or edit a built-in timer per block. When a task hits its target it's checked off automatically and the clock hands off to the next block of the same task.
landing.f3Body: A live summary totals your hours by task and fills a progress bar as your day unfolds.
landing.f4Body: Every day is saved and stays editable. Jump to any date to see what you planned and what you actually did.
landing.f5Body: Switch between English and Arabic instantly, with complete right-to-left support.
landing.f6Body: Set a day-start hour so late-night work still counts as the previous day, add ad-hoc tasks, and reorder on the fly.
landing.step1Body: List your daily tasks and breaks as time blocks, in the order you do them.
landing.step2Body: Start the timer on a block and check tasks off as you go. Alhemmah keeps the running total.
landing.step3Body: Look back at any day, see where your time went, and refine your routine.
landing.a1: Yes. Alhemmah is completely free to use, with no ads and no paywall.
landing.a2: Yes. The entire app works in both English and Arabic, with full right-to-left (RTL) layout.
landing.q3: How is it different from a to-do list?
landing.a3: Instead of a flat task list, Alhemmah models your whole day as ordered time blocks with durations, a per-task timer, and a saved daily history, so it tracks your routine, not just one-off tasks.
landing.q4: Do I need to install anything?
landing.a4: No. Alhemmah runs in your browser and can be added to your home screen as an app.
landing.ctaTitle: Ready to take charge of your day?
landing.ctaBody: Create a free account and build your first routine in minutes.
landing.footerTagline: A free, bilingual daily routine tracker.
